case_title: CHRISTOPHER WELLS et al VS. YEFIM GERTSENSHTEYN et al

RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (NO EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-22-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-22-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT FYODOR ENGLE WAIVES SERVICE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS, CHRISTOPHER WELLS, ROBYN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GERTSENSHTEYN, YEFIM ENGLE, FYODOR AKA AKA EIGER, BUCHOK AKA BUCHKOK, FEDIR GERTSENSHTEYN, ALLA ENGLE $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,500.00 INTEREST, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,135.00, PLAINTIFFS ESTABLISHED THAT DEFENDANTS EXCEEDED AUTHORITY GRANTED TO THEM BY ENTERING PLAINTIFF'S YARD AND CUTTING DOWN TOO MUCH OF THE TREE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
